scripts.dev:supertone: SUPERTONE_USE_GPU=true bash scripts/linux/run-python-with-torch.sh services/tts/supertone-service/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn --app-dir services/tts/supertone-service main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8100
scripts.dev:kokoro: PYTHON_SITE_PACKAGES_EXTRA=services/nlp/stanza-service/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages KOKORO_USE_GPU=true bash scripts/linux/run-python-with-torch.sh services/tts/kokoro-service/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn --app-dir services/tts/kokoro-service main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8200
scripts.dev:f5: PYTHON_SITE_PACKAGES_EXTRA=services/nlp/stanza-service/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 F5_TTS_REQUIRE_GPU=true bash scripts/linux/run-python-with-torch.sh services/tts/f5-service/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn --app-dir services/tts/f5-service main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8300
scripts.dev:voxtral: HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 bash scripts/linux/run-python-with-torch.sh services/tts/voxtral-service/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn --app-dir services/tts/voxtral-service main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8400
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:ocr && npm run smoke:supertone && npm run smoke:kokoro && npm run smoke:f5 && npm run smoke:voxtral
scripts.build:backend: bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run build --workspace=@ocr-app/shared && bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run build --workspace=./backend
scripts.build: bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run build:frontend && bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run build:backend
scripts.test:cov: bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run test:cov --workspace=frontend && bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npm run test:cov --workspace=./backend
scripts.test:e2e:browser: bash scripts/e2e/prepare-browser-env.sh && bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:browser:vocab: bash scripts/e2e/prepare-save-vocabulary-env.sh && bash scripts/linux/run-js-command.sh npx playwright test --config=playwright.save-vocabulary.config.ts
